heading: Nonpreemption of other law
label: 278 Nonpreemption of other law
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to limit the authority of the executive branch in the use of military personnel or equipment for civilian law enforcement purposes beyond that provided by law before .December 1, 1981
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 278, , , related to dissemination of information of interest to reserve components, prior to repeal by , §§ 1661(a)(2)(A), 1691, , , 3026, effective . See .act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 104170A Stat. 14Pub. L. 103–337, div. A, title XVI108 Stat. 2979section 10210 of this titleOct. 5, 1994Dec. 1, 1994
